title: hieracium kalmii var. canadense
intro: Hieracium kalmii var. canadense, also known as Kalm's Hawkweed or Mountain Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Hieracium kalmii var. canadense include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as acting as an antimicrobial agent to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
